common.connect_wallet_to_move: Connect wallet to make on-chain moves

about.title: About Skrim

why_blockchain.title: Why Blockchain?
why_blockchain.content:
Because serverless still needs to persist somewhere.  

Seriously though, I don't want to know your email. Compliance is a chore, any data about you I collect I have to secure and manage.  I'd rather just know you by your key and let Solana handle authentication.

fairness.title: Provable Fairness
fairness.description: Everything is public on-chain, no need to trust me.

tokens.title: No Predatory Tokens
tokens.description: No token, no aridrop, no BS. Just use $SOL.

developer.title: About the Developer
developer.bio: I've been engineering at early-stage SaaS startups for ~5 years, before that I was at larger companies like Google and US DoD.  I've been partcipating in Crypto stuff since I found Solana in 2020. Despite the prevelance of *ahem* questionable ethics in the crypto world, the core tech (see above about not wanting your email) is pretty cool.
skills_list: Can solve a Rubik's cube in ~5 minutes

phases.title: Phase 1: Initial Games (Current)
phases.description: Core lobby system, RPS++, Idiot Chess, and The Great Banyan

phases.title: Phase 2: Platform Features
phases.description: In-game chat, player ELO system, and more games.

phases.title: Phase 3: Expansion
phases.description: Mobile PWA optimization, and IDL for community games to integrate with The Great Banyan.

about.footer: Enjoying Skrim?  Buy the dev a coffee: willie.sol

create_modal.title: Create Challenge
create_modal.select_moves: Select your 5 moves for the challenge:

game.load_failed: Failed to load game data. Please try again.
game.no_moves_to_reveal: No moves to reveal - please submit moves first
game.moves_not_found_desc: It looks like the moves you committed for this challenge are not in your browser's local storage. This can happen if you cleared your cache, are on a different device, or used a different browser.
game.moves_not_found_note: Without the original salt and moves, you won't be able to reveal.
game.reveal_desc: Time to reveal the moves you submitted.
game.reveal_wait_desc: Your opponent must commit their moves before you can reveal.
game.waiting_opponent_submit: Waiting for opponent to submit their moves...
game.waiting_matchup_resolve: Waiting for your matchup to be resolved...

deadline.stalled_note: The opponent (or both of you) missed the 90s deadline. You can now claim the prize by forfeit or request a refund of your buy-in.

strategy_descriptions.fury_desc: Choose the move that would have defeated your opponent's move from the previous round.  Your rage will crush them, their lamentations will echo only briefly
strategy_descriptions.serenity_desc: Repeat the same move you performed in the previous round. Your path is clear to you, you will not let those who oppose you make you falter.
strategy_descriptions.trickery_desc: Choose the move that would have lost to your opponent's move from the previous round, luring them into a false sense of security. Strike when their hubris overwhelms them.

toasts.revealed_auto: Moves revealed! Matchup will be resolved automatically.
toasts.reveal_failed: Failed to reveal moves - please try again
toasts.claimed_congrats: Congratulations! Prize transferred to your wallet!

game.waiting_opponent: Waiting for opponent to move on-chain...
